depression.description: I feel constantly overwhelmed by the commitments I've made to my friends, and I often feel guilty when I can't meet their needs or when I prioritize my own well-being.

depression.topic: Struggling with procrastination and time management
depression.description: I know I need to be more organized and manage my time better, but I often find myself procrastinating and feeling anxious about being late to things.
I often feel like I'm unlovable and that people will eventually reject me, which makes it hard for me to open up to others.
I tend to avoid confrontation, especially with Cricket, because I believe it will only lead to more negativity in my life.

Delusion.description: I feel like I have to take care of my friends, like Lucy, but this often leads to anxiety and makes me feel like I'm losing control of my own life.

Delusion.topic: Fear of being late and disappointing others
Delusion.description: Whenever I’m late to appointments or gatherings, I feel like I'm disappointing everyone, which only adds to my anxiety and guilt.
